summary: Iter 257 frontend verification: system-wide animation purge + 4 more pages converted to FilterChipSelect. Login as superadmin@oryno.com, exercised /admin/bills, /admin/bookings, /admin/employees, /management/packages, /admin/operators. All 7 spec points pass. The two minor polish items from iter 256 (dialog backdrop pop-on and Tooltip controlled/uncontrolled console warnings) are BOTH RESOLVED in this iter. No new console errors. Only caveat: PackageManagement.jsx Status chip lives inside a `<TabsContent value="management">` block which superadmin lands outside of — runtime verification of that chip will need operator@test.com login or the operator-side surface; source-level diff is correct.

animation_purge.universal_star_transition_property: background-color, border-color, color, fill, stroke, opacity, box-shadow
animation_purge.universal_button_active_rule_in_styleshe: [] (rule fully removed; .btn-primary:active scale(0.97) still present as opt-in but no global button:active)

package_management_chip.reason: Status chip lives inside <TabsContent value='management'>; superadmin route landing tab is Dashboard/Services/Communications (different surface than the operator PackageManagement). Source diff at /app/frontend/src/pages/management/PackageManagement.jsx L557-567 is correct (label=Status, icon=CheckCircle, options=[all, ...STATUS_OPTIONS], testid=package-status-filter).
package_management_chip.options_definition: STATUS_OPTIONS contains in_progress, delivered, etc — confirmed via grep

dialog_fade_preservation.iter256_residual_gap_status: RESOLVED — the .admin-modal backdrop now fades (was animation:none in iter 256). Note: there is still a separate inner Radix overlay div (no testid) with animation:none, but it is not the visible backdrop — admin-modal is the user-visible fading backdrop.

console_health.iter256_radix_tooltip_noise_status: RESOLVED — FilterChipSelect.jsx L43-49 now uses always-controlled tipOpen state; no Radix uncontrolled→controlled warnings observed
remaining_warnings: recharts: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' on /management/packages dashboard tab — pre-existing, unrelated to this iter

action_items: (Optional) Source-verify the PackageManagement Status chip at runtime by logging in as operator@test.com and opening the operator-side packages list, since superadmin's /management/packages surface is a different component tree. Source code is correct; only runtime visual confirmation is pending.
(Pre-existing, unrelated) recharts container -1 width warning on /management/packages Dashboard tab — chart container needs minWidth/minHeight or aspect ratio. Not in scope of this iter.
critical_code_review_comments: global.css L13-17 — universal `* { transition-property: ...}` no longer lists `transform`. This is the right surgical fix and matches the user complaint exactly (fly-in/zoom feel during layout shifts is gone).
global.css L93-101 — .animate-fadeIn neutralised to `animation: none`. Layout.jsx sidebar dropdowns still render but no longer fly in. Good comment block explaining the intent.
global.css L182-187 — .card-interactive:hover only changes box-shadow; the translateY rule is removed. The follow-up :active rule was correctly dropped too.

FilterChipSelect.jsx L43-49 — switched from `open={open?false:undefined}` to a controlled `tipOpen` state with `showTip = tipOpen && !open`. This eliminates the React 18 controlled/uncontrolled tooltip warnings flagged in iter 256.

BillsManagement.jsx, Bookings.jsx, EmployeesManagement.jsx, PackageManagement.jsx — all 8 filter Selects in the sweep are converted correctly. Form-level <Select>s (Create/Edit modals on EmployeesManagement L372, L382, L411, L744, L755, L768 and on PackageManagement L775, L826) are intentionally left alone — those are form inputs, not filters.

index.css L230-233 no-animation rule with [role=dialog]/[data-radix-dialog-content] exceptions correctly preserves dialog content fade; admin-modal backdrop now also fades because it carries its own [data-state=open] animation.

success_rate.frontend: 7/7 spec points verified — animation purge, 4-page sweep (Bills/Bookings/Employees/Packages source-level, 3 verified at runtime), dialog fade preserved, no console errors/warnings.

test_credentials: superadmin@oryno.com / testpassword123 (2-step: 'Login to Your Account' → email + Continue → password + Login).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 257 confirms global.css purge is effective: probe an empty div and getComputedStyle().transitionProperty will NOT include 'transform'. Probe a .animate-fadeIn div and animationName='none'. All FilterChipSelect chips share the same data-testid scheme: each chip uses the testid passed in props (e.g. bills-status-filter, emp-dept-filter, filter-status, filter-category, package-status-filter) and the popover options are `[data-testid=filter-option-{value}]` buttons. Brand blue active chip = rgb(8,44,89). admin-modal backdrop's iter-256 pop-on is fixed (animationName=fadeIn, 0.2s). FilterChipSelect's tooltip controlled/uncontrolled console warning from iter 256 is also fixed via tipOpen state. /management/packages under superadmin shows a different surface (Dashboard/Services/Communications tabs) than the operator-side PackageManagement.jsx — the Status chip is source-verified at L557-567 but runtime check would need operator login or operator-side routing.
rca of the issue: No new issues. Two iter-256 residuals (dialog backdrop pop-on, tooltip uncontrolled warning) were both addressed in this iter: (a) admin-modal now carries its own data-state animation (fadeIn 0.2s) so the visible backdrop fades regardless of the index.css no-animation sweep; (b) FilterChipSelect uses a stable controlled tipOpen state instead of toggling between false and undefined.
